question: Will South Carolina H.3492 (partially refundable EITC) be signed into law in 2026?
textDescription:
Resolves YES if South Carolina H.3492 is signed into law by December 31, 2026.

H.3492 would make 25% of the excess state Earned Income Tax Credit refundable. It is currently in the House Ways and Means Committee. South Carolina's 2026 legislative session is scheduled to adjourn in mid-May.

Resolution source: SC Legislature bill tracker and governor's office.

Tracked by PolicyEngine's state legislative tracker.
